candidates.why: Generic operating depreciation appears as a separate line at the same level as operating expenses, but nothing indicates it is specifically tied to COGS/raw materials. Assigning it to COGS would be speculative.
Generic operating amortization appears separately, but there is no COGS/cost-of-sales wording and no indication it belongs to the raw-materials bucket.

variables.notes: Selected COGS bucket is only 'Raw materials'. The excerpt shows no explicit depreciation/amortization row labelled as COGS, cost of sales, or cost of revenues. Generic D&A rows are separate operating lines but are not clearly attributable to COGS, so none should be added separately to COGS.

candidates.why: A separate operating depreciation line exists outside the selected XSGA component rows, which suggests D&A may not be embedded in those selected rows. However, the line is generic and may include production as well as overhead depreciation, so assigning it wholly to XSGA is uncertain.
A separate operating amortization line exists outside the selected XSGA component rows, but it is not labelled as SG&A/admin/marketing and could include non-SG&A portions.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This is explicitly R&D-related amortization, but XRD was mapped separately and not included in XSGA components. Adding it to XSGA_DA could distort the intended SG&A/R&D split without clearer symmetry in the statement.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA bucket is 'Personnel expenses' + 'Other operating expenses' + 'Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses'. Separate generic depreciation/amortization lines appear at the same operating level, so they may sit outside those selected rows; however, the excerpt does not show whether they belong to SG&A versus production/other operating functions. The explicit R&D amortization row is a special case, but because XRD is handled separately and the excerpt does not clearly support adding that amortization to XSGA, the conservative output is no separate selection pending manual review.
